text: On 17/09/2015, Ethan Mercer went missing.
On 17/09/2015, David Mercer (the elder) went missing.
On 17/09/2015, Victor Mercer went missing.
On 17/09/2015, Ethan and David (elder) left on an evening road trip through Ashwood Tunnel.
On 17/09/2015, they were heading to Clara's grave at Raven Falls National Park.
On 17/09/2015, Victor called Ethan to warn him about something.
On 17/09/2015, Victor's phone was found near Ashwood Tunnel entrance.
On 17/09/2015, Victor was seen running toward Ashwood Tunnel.
On 17/09/2015, Victor reportedly said his memories had returned.
On 17/09/1995, Clara Mercer died during childbirth at Raven Falls Hospital.
On 17/09/1995, Ethan Mercer was born at Raven Falls Hospital.
On 17/09/1995, David Mercer (the elder) died in a truck accident near Ashwood Tunnel.
On 17/09/1995, a younger David Mercer was at Raven Falls Hospital awaiting his son's birth.
On 17/09/1995, two men named David Mercer were at Raven Falls Hospital.
On 17/09/1995, one David Mercer died from a truck accident.
On 17/09/1995, the other David Mercer's wife died in childbirth.
On 17/09/1995, a man named 'Victor' was treated for minor crash injuries.
On 17/09/1995, 'Victor' had no identification on him.
On 17/09/1995, a scrap of paper with 'Victor' was found in his pocket.
Ethan Mercer is the son of David Mercer (the elder).
Victor Mercer is the adopted brother of David Mercer (the younger).
After 17/09/1995, the younger David took 'Victor' into his home.
From 1995 to 2015, Victor lived and worked for the younger David.
From 1995 to 2015, Victor helped raise Ethan Mercer.
From 1995 to 2015, Victor made accurate predictions about future events.
From 1995 to 2015, neighbors called Victor 'the Seer'.
Victor has no birth, school, or identity records before 17/09/1995.
Handwriting analysis links the 'Victor' note to both Victor and Ethan.
The three 17/09/2015 disappearances connect to the 1995 deaths.
Ashwood Tunnel is linked to all three missing persons cases.
Unverified reports describe unusual light phenomena near Ashwood Tunnel.
